name: AIR-DROW Hand Tracking & Performance Stabilization Edition
delivery: This complete final source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. node_modules and public are intentionally excluded because the production output is regenerated from package-lock.json and web during build.
iconReplacement: The complete local icon package remains installed. Scanner status marks use resilient inline vectors for Android, while the editable local icon package remains available for future artwork replacement.
releaseName: AIR-DROW Hand Tracking & Performance Stabilization Edition
summary: A hand-reliability release: fresh-frame inference scheduling, adaptive performance, protected canvas zones and a quiet stable-only hand guide.
releaseChecks: Fresh decoded camera frames drive hand inference; duplicate video frames are skipped.
Slow devices adapt hand-tracking cadence without changing artwork or interrupting active ink.
Hand coordinates cannot paint through palette, toolbar, dock, settings or dialog surfaces.
Export remains physical-tap-only and captures artwork without UI or hand-guide overlays.
